name: Calculadora de Interés Simple
desc: Calcula los intereses y capital final con interés simple.
description: Calcula los intereses y capital final con interés simple.
seo_description: Calcula los intereses y el capital final de una inversión o préstamo con interés simple. Resultado al instante..
example_label: Calculating simple interest on €8,500 at 4.25% annual rate over 4.5 years.
result_context: The intereses of {intereses} is the total interest earned. Your capital_final of {capital_final} includes both principal and interest.

steps.description: Multiply principal by rate and time
Add interest to principal for final amount

mistakes: Using compound interest fórmula when simple interest applies (short-term loans)
Forgetting to convert percentage to decimal before calculation
Confusing simple interest with compound interest for savings accounts
